rulings.Case Title: ROSEMARIE MACGUINNESS ET AL VS. 246 CARL STREET (EAT), LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice 246 Carl Street (Eat), Llc?S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 1. DEFENDANT 246 CARL STREET (EAT), LLC'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Motion granted April 11, 2022. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO EAGLE BAR LLC, FORMERLY KNOWN AS VS. VOULA NIKITOPOULOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Voula Nikitopoulos And Dina Nikitopoulos Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs After Order Expunging Lis Pendens And Denial Of Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 2. DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS AFTER ORDER EXPUNGING LIS PENDENS AND DENIAL OF WRIT OF MANDATE is GRANTED. Defendant is awarded $36,968.50 in attorney's fees. Defendant's request for an additional $2,422.50 to prepare the reply is denied. rulings.Case Title: KDM, A JOINT VENTURE VS. ALI AHMED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Notice Of Hearing & Motion For Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 3. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF HEARING AND MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS is GRANTED. The Court orders Defendant's Amended Answer stricken. Plaintiff may seek a Request for Default and Default Judgment. Plaintiff must prove their damages. All matters of fact in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions are deemed admitted and documents genuine. Sanctions in the amount of $2,681.77 is granted. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: REINO NIEMELA ET AL VS. JEFFREY EVANS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 5. DEFENDANTS JEFFREY EVANS AND JEREMIAH JACKSON'S AMENDED MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. rulings.Case Title: 600-610 LEAVENWORTH I3, LP VS. JOSEF JACINTO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Plaintiff 600-610 Leavenworth I3, Lp?S Motion To Compel Written Discovery And Deem Admissions; Request For Sanction In The Amount Of $1,500.00
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 9. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND DEEM ADMISSIONS; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,500.00 is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Complete, verified responses without objections to the Form Interrogatories (General and UD), Special Interrogatories, and Requests for Production shall be provided within 5 days of notice of entry of this order. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $300. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: MISSION LODGE MASONIC HALL ASSOCIATION, A VS. PEGASUS TRUCKING, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 2, 2022 line 10. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. (See Stancil v. Superior Court (2021) 11 Cal.5th 381.) Defendant wholly fails to explain how the complaint failed to allege an unlawful detainer claim as defined in section 1161. Stancil does not permit the use of a motion to quash to challenge personal jurisdiction based on the complaint's purported failure to allege proper service of the notice. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
